perturbation.original_text: You agree to be responsible for any breach of this Confidentiality Agreement by any of your Affiliates and the Representatives.
perturbation.changed_text: You agree to be responsible for any general action.
perturbation.explanation: The original text clearly defines responsibility for breaches of the Confidentiality Agreement by Affiliates and Representatives. The changed text introduces a contradiction by removing the specific definition, it uses a vague term, this undermines the enforceability of the entire agreement, because the term is not well defined. The specific scope of liability, as described in the original text, becomes ambiguous in the changed text, because now the original contract relies on the specific actions, covered by the agreement, and this creates an in-text contradiction, with the rest of the contract, especially if there is an action performed, that can be understood as a breach of the current agreement
perturbation.contradicted_text: It is understood and agreed that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Confidentiality Agreement by you, your Affiliates or the Representatives, and that the Company shall be entitled to equitable relief, including injunction and specific performance, as a remedy for any such breach or threat thereof. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Confidentiality Agreement and shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity to the Company.
perturbation.justification: The original text specifically defines responsibility for breaches related to 'Affiliates and Representatives' concerning the Confidentiality Agreement. The changed text broadens this to 'any general action,' creating ambiguity and potentially conflicting with the contradicted text. The contradicted text states that money damages are not a sufficient remedy for breaches of the Confidentiality Agreement by 'you, your Affiliates or the Representatives.' Because the changed text removes the definition of who is liable for damages, replacing it with a vague term, this undermines the enforceability of the entire agreement, because the term is not well defined. Therefore, the modified text causes a strong in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Subject to the section captioned “Legally Required Disclosure” below, you agree that you will not, and you will cause your Affiliates and the Representatives not to disclose to any other Person (as defined in Appendix A hereto): (a) that Evaluation Material has been provided to you or any Permitted Co-bidder (as defined in Appendix A hereto) or that you or any Permitted Co-bidder have received or inspected any portion of the Evaluation Material, (b) the existence or contents of this Confidentiality Agreement, (c) that discussions or negotiations concerning a possible Transaction are taking place or (d) any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect thereto (including the status thereof), provided, however , that nothing contained herein shall be deemed to inhibit, impair or restrict you or the Representatives from having discussions or negotiations with other Persons relating to potential financing in connection with the possible Transaction so long as each of such Person agrees in writing to be bound by the terms of this Confidentiality Agreement pursuant to a joinder agreement in a form reasonably acceptable to the Company.
perturbation.changed_text: Subject to the section captioned “Legally Required Disclosure” below, you agree that you will not disclose to any other Person: (a) that Evaluation Material has been provided to you or that you have received or inspected any portion of the Evaluation Material, (b) the existence or contents of this Confidentiality Agreement, (c) that discussions or negotiations concerning any activity are taking place or (d) any of the terms, conditions or other facts with respect thereto, provided, however , that nothing contained herein shall be deemed to inhibit, impair or restrict you from having discussions or negotiations with other Persons relating to potential financing.
perturbation.explanation: By removing the phrase 'cause your Affiliates and the Representatives not to disclose', the direct responsibility of Affiliates and Representatives, has a direct impact on how the contract should be interpreted. By removing the parties that should 'not disclose', it implies that they are now free to disclose information. The modified text now contradicts the entire agreement, because now the Affiliates and Representatives, are now free to disclose information. This means if the Company sues due to disclosure from Affiliates and Representatives, they will now be free, since they do not have the responsability to 'not disclose', in contrast, with other parties like the original signer.
perturbation.contradicted_text: It is understood and agreed that money damages would not be a sufficient remedy for any breach of this Confidentiality Agreement by you, your Affiliates or the Representatives, and that the Company shall be entitled to equitable relief, including injunction and specific performance, as a remedy for any such breach or threat thereof. Such remedies shall not be deemed to be the exclusive remedies for a breach of this Confidentiality Agreement and shall be in addition to all other remedies available at law or equity to the Company.
perturbation.justification: The original text explicitly states that the you, your Affiliates, and the Representatives shall not disclose information, whereas the changed text omits 'cause your Affiliates and the Representatives not to disclose' , resulting in only 'you' agreeing to not disclose information. This omission directly contradicts the 'Contradicted Text' which specifies that damages can be sought for breaches by 'you, your Affiliates or the Representatives'. Because Affiliates and Representatives are no longer explicitly obligated to not disclose, it creates a contradiction because the agreement anticipates them being bound but the modified section removes that obligation. This aligns with the Omissions - In Text Contradiction definition, as essential language was removed, creating a contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Representations and Warranties . (a) You hereby represent and warrant that you are not acting as a broker for or representative of any other Person in connection with the Transaction, and are considering the Transaction only for your own account. Except with the prior written consent of the Company, you agree that (a) you will not act as a joint bidder or co-bidder with any other Person with respect to the Transaction, other than Permitted Co-bidders, and (b) neither you nor any of the Representatives (acting on behalf of you or your Affiliates) will enter into any discussions, negotiations, agreements, arrangements or understandings (whether written or oral) with any other Person regarding the Transaction, other than the Company and its representatives. (b) You hereby represent and warrant that neither you nor any of your Affiliates or the Representatives is party to any agreement, arrangement or understanding (whether written or oral) that would restrict the ability of any other Person to provide financing (debt, equity or otherwise) to any other Person for the Transaction or any similar transaction, and you hereby agree that neither you nor any of your Affiliates or the Representatives will directly or indirectly restrict the ability of any other Person to provide any such financing. (c) Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained herein, without the prior written consent of the Company, you agree that neither you, your Affiliates, nor any of your or the Representatives will disclose any Evaluation Material to any actual or potential sources of financing (debt, equity or otherwise), other than (a) bona fide third party institutional lenders who are or may be engaged to provide debt financing to you or your Affiliates or (b) Permitted Co-bidders.
perturbation.changed_text: Representations and Warranties . (a) You hereby represent and warrant that you are not acting as a broker for or representative of any other Person in connection with any activity, and are considering any activity only for your own account. Except with the prior written consent of the Company, you agree that (a) you will not act as a joint bidder or co-bidder with any other Person with respect to any activity, other than Permitted Co-bidders, and (b) neither you nor any of the Representatives (acting on behalf of you or your Affiliates) will enter into any discussions, negotiations, agreements, arrangements or understandings (whether written or oral) with any other Person regarding any activity, other than the Company and its representatives. (b) You hereby represent and warrant that neither you nor any of your Affiliates or the Representatives is party to any agreement, arrangement or understanding (whether written or oral) that would restrict the ability of any other Person to provide financing (debt, equity or otherwise) to any other Person for any activity or any similar transaction, and you hereby agree that neither you nor any of your Affiliates or the Representatives will directly or indirectly restrict the ability of any other Person to provide any such financing. (c) Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained herein, without the prior written consent of the Company, you agree that neither you, your Affiliates, nor any of your or the Representatives will disclose any Evaluation Material to any actual or potential sources of financing (debt, equity or otherwise), other than (a) bona fide third party institutional lenders who are or may be engaged to provide debt financing to you or your Affiliates or (b) Permitted Co-bidders.
perturbation.explanation: The change from 'Transaction' to 'any activity' broadens the scope of the restrictions and representations, creating uncertainty. It makes the whole process ambiguous by removing the defined term and replacing it with a very high level term. Because there is no context on what is an activity, it can have multiple interpretations, because there is no clear delimitation of what should be understood with the phrase ‘any activity’. This creates an in-text contradiction because the agreement attempts to define all of those actions, but by the phrase ‘any activity’ it makes it nearly impossible, since it can include anything. This then brings the contract to be impossible to enforce.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Representations and Warranties . (a) You hereby represent and warrant that you are not acting as a broker for or representative of any other Person in connection with any activity, and are considering any activity only for your own account. Except with the prior written consent of the Company, you agree that (a) you will not act as a joint bidder or co-bidder with any other Person with respect to any activity, other than Permitted Co-bidders, and (b) neither you nor any of the Representatives (acting on behalf of you or your Affiliates) will enter into any discussions, negotiations, agreements, arrangements or understandings (whether written or oral) with any other Person regarding any activity, other than the Company and its representatives. (b) You hereby represent and warrant that neither you nor any of your Affiliates or the Representatives is party to any agreement, arrangement or understanding (whether written or oral) that would restrict the ability of any other Person to provide financing (debt, equity or otherwise) to any other Person for any activity or any similar transaction, and you hereby agree that neither you nor any of your Affiliates or the Representatives will directly or indirectly restrict the ability of any other Person to provide any such financing. (c) Notwithstanding anything to the contrary contained herein, without the prior written consent of the Company, you agree that neither you, your Affiliates, nor any of your or the Representatives will disclose any Evaluation Material to any actual or potential sources of financing (debt, equity or otherwise), other than (a) bona fide third party institutional lenders who are or may be engaged to provide debt financing to you or your Affiliates or (b) Permitted Co-bidders.
perturbation.justification: The change from 'Transaction' to 'any activity' significantly broadens the scope of restrictions and representations. This creates a strong in-text contradiction, as 'any activity' lacks a clear definition and can be interpreted in multiple ways, undermining the specific obligations and constraints outlined in other sections of the agreement. This is because the original text defines 'Transaction' which has more of a delimitation than the term 'any activity'. Therefore, there is a strong contradiction.
